sourceMovie.title: Hello, My Name Is Doris
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hello, My Name Is Doris (2015) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Michael Showalter's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: When Harry Met Sally...
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hello, My Name Is Doris clicked for you, When Harry Met Sally... (1989) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hello, My Name Is Doris?
faq.answer: Try When Harry Met Sally..., The Apartment, Sex and the City—each shares DNA with Hello, My Name Is Doris while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hello, My Name Is Doris?
faq.answer: Hello, My Name Is Doris (2015) is best described as Comedy, Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hello, My Name Is Doris worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
